title: NotThatExpensive
description: NotThatExpensive is a mod that removes the "Too Expensive" functionality from the Anvil, also works on Singleplayer!
body:
# NotThatExpensive
NotThatExpensive is a mod that makes it possible to enchant items even when the cost is _"Too Expensive"._ 
It works by limiting the enchantment cost to 39 (the game's max cost is 40)
